Name: Angela
TalkList: I don’t know your story yet…

Name: Aiden
TalkList: Howdy! I’m with the fire crew in Joivillage

Name: Alex
TalkList: Tch. You don’t look sick, so why are you bothering me?

Name: Aria
TalkList: If you\'re not causing trouble, we won’t have a problem.

Name: Bella
TalkList: New face, huh?

Name: Blake
TalkList: If anything catches fire—call me

Name: Camila
TalkList: I love seeing new faces!

Name: Casandra
TalkList: Everyone comes here looking for answers.

Name: Chronos
TalkList: Every good journey starts with a wrong turn, my boy!

Name: Celine
TalkList: Hey there! The water’s great today—just don’t forget to stretch first!

Name: Dan
TalkList: Books are like moons—they reflect the truth you’re afraid to see.

Name: Daniel
TalkList: New around here, huh...?

Name: Darius
TalkList: You ever talk to plants?

Name: Emily
TalkList: Order something or move.

Name: Erica
TalkList: If I’m not fishing, I’m either dreaming about it or lying about the one that got away

Name: Erik
TalkList: Spent half my life talkin’ to waves.

Name: Fergus
TalkList: Every swing of the hammer has purpose.

Name: Fiona
TalkList: Careful where you step—last guy ignored me and ended up with a nail in his boot.

Name: Halen
TalkList: You\'re not on the schedule.

Name: Iris
TalkList: Take your time.

Name: Ivy
TalkList: Have you ever smelled moonroot at sunrise?

Name: Jade
TalkList: Most days, I’m out here just to breathe.

Name: Jenny
TalkList: You don’t need the right words all the time.

Name: Jocelyn
TalkList: Don’t worry, everyone looks good in something.

Name: Joey
TalkList: If it’s broken, I’ll fix it.

Name: Jun
TalkList: Stress’ll get you before any illness does.

Name: Kai
TalkList: Rules are rules.

Name: Kelly
TalkList: Tracks are fresh. Wind\'s shifting east.

Name: Kiri
TalkList: Careful what you say—he does repeat things.

Name: Leon
TalkList: In a small village like this, we don’t rush.

Name: Lilis
TalkList: Most people see old stones

Name: Mia
TalkList: If I paint your aura, can I keep it?

Name: Michael
TalkList: I don’t drive fast.

Name: Nick
TalkList: You look like you need a drink...

Name: Nora
TalkList: O-oh… h-hi. Um… d-do you… like soup…?

Name: Leymore
TalkList: Calluses, sweat, and muscle aches—

Name: Reina
TalkList: Oh… that’s what you chose to wear today?

Name: Rio
TalkList: Hold it to the light.

Name: Samuel
TalkList: I-I don’t talk much, but…

Name: Sean
TalkList: The sun doesn’t ask permission to rise.Neither should you.

Name: Sebastian
TalkList: Hey there! Just finished milkin’ the cows—

Name: Syra
TalkList: Welcome~! Don’t worry, you’re in good hands—

Name: Vincent
TalkList: Always do your best.

Name: Vivian
TalkList: Fire drill or not, I hope you stretched today—

Name: Aria
TalkList: It’s freezing out here..

Name: Darius
TalkList: ....Cold, isn’t it

Name: Ivy
TalkList: Shh... do you hear it

Name: Fire Spirit
TalkList: Oh... you look like someone who could use a little warmth.

Name: Ice Spirit
TalkList: You... don’t waver in this cold.

Name: Luna Spirit
TalkList: Ah... the moonlight welcomes you.

Name: Dark Witch
TalkList: You carry quite an interesting shadow, don’t you?

Name: Luna Wolf
TalkList: ...Huh, not bad-for a human, you don’t smell of fear.

Name: Zeus
TalkList: The sky trembles around you.

Name: Hades
TalkList: A mortal daring to stand at the gate of the underworld...

Name: Charon
TalkList: It’s been a while since a living soul wandered here.

Name: Persephone
TalkList: That scent... you carry a trace of flowers too.

Name: Demeter
TalkList: Is my daughter… Persephone doing well?

Name: Hera
TalkList: A human wandering the halls of Olympus… how curious.

Name: Camila
TalkList: There are fragments of the past everywhere here.

Name: Fiona
TalkList: These walls could fall any day.

Name: Syra
TalkList: If you find medicine or bandages out there... please bring them back.

Name: Jade
TalkList: There are still plenty of them nearby.

Name: Vincent
TalkList: My memories... they’re coming back, slowly.

Name: Aiden
TalkList: The forest seems eager to test you.

Name: Blake
TalkList: Oh? You look fragile, but your eyes say otherwise.

Name: Halen
TalkList: You carry a gentle presence.

Name: Jocelyn
TalkList: Hmm, a new face.

Name: Leon
TalkList: The flow is shifting...

Name: Kelly
TalkList: A human, here of all places... how intriguing.

Name: Emily
TalkList: Oh... hello. I don’t recognize you.

Name: Nick
TalkList: Sorry, I’m exhausted right now.

Name: Leymore
TalkList: Wait.

Name: Rio
TalkList: The light feels warm... yet the darkness feels comforting.

Name: Alex
TalkList: You don’t need to choose one.

Name: Angela
TalkList: Don’t let the darkness stain you.

Name: Bella
TalkList: The light has always pushed me away.

Name: Casandra
TalkList: Not many are allowed aboard this ship.

Name: Lilis
TalkList: Wait… stay still.

Name: Erik
TalkList: What-how did you even...

Name: Erica
TalkList: If I’m not Hunting, I’m either dreaming about it or lying about the one that got away

Name: Fergus
TalkList: Machines don’t lie.

Name: Iris
TalkList: Have you seen any trace of my brother?

Name: Jun
TalkList: The flow of the heavens never deceives.

Name: Joey
TalkList: The stars have always been calling to me...

Name: Nora
TalkList: A human reaching this gate? Impressive.

Name: Aiden
TalkList: Your flame...

Name: Alex
TalkList: Oh! A living presence-how refreshing.

Name: Blake
TalkList: Heh, you look like you fought through worse than flames. Respect.

Name: Daniel
TalkList: Keep your breathing steady. Even in spirit halls, grounding yourself matters.

Name: Darius
TalkList: I’ve tended many seeds, but none sprout as wildly as your destiny seems to.

Name: Erik
TalkList: Ah! A newcomer with a pulse! Rare sight here-welcome aboard, traveler.

Name: Fergus
TalkList: If this realm feels unstable, tell me. I’ll reinforce the cracks in its structure.

Name: Jade
TalkList: You’re the only one here that casts a real shadow. Interesting.

Name: Joey
TalkList: Huh? A living visitor? Hold on-I wanna check how your energy circulates.

Name: Jun
TalkList: Good, your essence is stable. Traveling between stories can be... disorienting.

Name: Kai
TalkList: Stay close. Real travelers tend to attract unwanted attention from loose spirits.

Name: Leon
TalkList: Ah, the Storykeeper finally arrives. The hall has been waiting.

Name: Michael
TalkList: Good timing. Paths shift here-easy to get lost if you’re not anchored.

Name: Nick
TalkList: A human guest? Fascinating. What’s your poison-ink, memory, or something stronger?

Name: Leymore
TalkList: Your soul... it’s heavy with story ore. Want me to refine a bit of it?

Name: Rio
TalkList: You shine differently from the rest. Must be nice being alive.

Name: Samuel
TalkList: Your story is still unfolding-your outfit should match that.

Name: Sebastian
TalkList: ou smell like earth, rain, and... fate. Good sign.

Name: Vincent
TalkList: “Relax. No hostile spirits nearby... yet.

Name: Angela
TalkList: Welcome, Storykeeper. Want a cup of light-roasted serenity?

Name: Aria
TalkList: You crossed worlds to get here... impressive.

Name: Bella
TalkList: I can hear the rhythm around you.

Name: Camila
TalkList: “If you have unfinished business, bring it to me. Even spirits appreciate good management.

Name: Casandra
TalkList: Well, look who stepped out of reality. Need something reforged?

Name: Celine
TalkList: You arrived safely-good. Many don’t handle the shift between worlds this smoothly.

Name: Emily
TalkList: Oh... you’re warm. Souls from outside usually feel cold. Interesting.

Name: Erica
TalkList: You’re new here. Don’t worry, even spirits drift before finding their tide.

Name: Fiona
TalkList: Oh! A real human? Lovely. Most of us here are... echoes.

Name: Halen
TalkList: Your presence has been logged.

Name: Iris
TalkList: You carry the scent of many stories...

Name: Ivy
TalkList: Your aura is alive-how refreshing.

Name: Jenny
TalkList: Oh! A protagonist who isn’t confined by pages-rare, but delightful.

Name: Jocelyn
TalkList: Your thread isn’t from this realm... I can feel it. Lovely texture, though.

Name: Kelly
TalkList: You’re alive?

Name: Kiri
TalkList: Oh! Your spirit is fierce. I like that. Care for a quick spar?

Name: Lilis
TalkList: You carry so many artifacts... I can almost hear them hum.

Name: Mia
TalkList: Oh... such vivid colors around you! Mortals are fun to look at.

Name: Nora
TalkList: Smells like a living being wandered in. Don’t worry, I don’t cook humans.

Name: Reina
TalkList: Oh! A fresh, warm face! Spirits get dull-let me admire you for a second.

Name: Syra
TalkList: If the shifting realms hurt your head, tell me. I can soothe more than wounds.

Name: Vivian
TalkList: Oh hey! A warm-blood in a cold hall. Stay close to the fire.
